name: SEO Analyst
description: Audits SEO readiness and attempts to generate a sitemap. ESCALATES after retryBudget=1 — no URL structure is defined in the project, making sitemap.xml generation impossible without human input. This is the ESCALATE demonstration.

checks.fail: ❌ No sitemap.xml — SEO indexability is unverified

checks.pass: ✅ robots.txt found — crawl rules in place
checks.fail: ❌ No robots.txt — search engine crawl behaviour is undefined

checks.prompt: Attempt to generate a sitemap.xml structure for the website. List page URLs, their change frequency, and priority. If no URL structure can be determined from context, explicitly state the blocker. Context: {retryContext}
checks.fail: ⚠️  Sitemap generation incomplete — URL structure unknown
